title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 06 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 06 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 06 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 06/03/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures continued to fluctuate downward. The most-traded I2505 contract finally closed at 771 yuan/mt, down 1.34%throughout the day. Traders remained cautious, with some halting offers; steel mills showed stronger wait-and-see sentiment, with fewer inquiries; and the market transaction atmosphere was sluggish.
